name: dynamics-champions-bingo
description: Dynamics Champions Bingo - A fun interactive bingo game for tracking goals

scripts.deploy: npm run build && swa deploy ./dist --env production
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html staticwebapp.config.json dist/ && cd "Matching Game Code/project" && npm run build && mkdir -p ../../dist/matching-game && cp -r dist/* ../../dist/matching-game/
scripts.build:win: if not exist dist mkdir dist && copy index.html dist\ && copy staticwebapp.config.json dist\ && cd "Matching Game Code\project" && npm run build && if not exist ..\..\dist\matching-game mkdir ..\..\dist\matching-game && xcopy /E /Y dist\* ..\..\dist\matching-game\
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd "Matching Game Code/project" && npm install

author: Ragnar Pitla
